2605.29561.title: ParaTool: Shifting Tool Representations from Context to Parameters
2605.29561.paper_summary: Tool calling extends large language models (LLMs) by enabling grounded interaction with external executable interfaces, thereby supporting environment-coupled problem solving. However, mainstream in-context learning (ICL) approaches typically incorporate detailed tool documentation and usage examples directly into the context. This results in substantial inference overhead and heightened risks of hallucination as the context length grows. Conversely, while tuning-based methods improve general tool-calling capabilities, they often fail to effectively internalize the specific details of previously seen tools, thereby retaining a dependency on in-context documentation. To address these limitations, we propose ParaTool, a framework that projects each tool into a dedicated, loadable set of parameters. By equipping a dynamic integration of these parameterized tools, the LLM can perform tool calling without relying on in-context documents or examples. Specifically, our approach consists of three stages: (1) parametric tool pre-training encapsulates the knowledge of different tools into independent parameter modules; (2) soft tool selection employs a gating network to dynamically weigh and aggregate relevant tool parameters; and (3) parametric tool fine-tuning jointly updates tool parameters to align the training and inference processes. Experiments on Stable ToolBench and BFCL demonstrate that ParaTool significantly outperforms strong ICL-based baselines, achieving superior performance while reducing computational complexity.
2605.29561.paper_summary_zh: 工具調用擴展了大型語言模型（LLMs），通過啟用與外部可執行接口的基於環境的互動，從而支持環境耦合的問題解決。<lb/>然而，主流的上下文學習（ICL）方法通常將詳細的工具文檔和使用示例直接納入上下文中。<lb/>這導致了可觀的推理開銷和隨著上下文長度增長而加劇的幻覺風險。<lb/>相反，雖然基於調整的方法改善了通用的工具調用能力，但它們往往無法有效內化先前見過的工具的具體細節，從而仍然依賴於上下文文檔。<lb/>為了解決這些限制，我們提出了ParaTool，一個將每個工具投影到專用的可加載參數集的框架。<lb/>通過配備這些參數化工具的動態整合，LLM可以在不依賴上下文文檔或示例的情況下執行工具調用。<lb/>具體而言，我們的方法包括三個階段：（1）參數化工具預訓練將不同工具的知識封裝到獨立的參數模塊中；（2）軟工具選擇使用門控網絡動態加權和聚合相關的工具參數；（3）參數化工具微調共同更新工具參數，以對齊訓練和推理過程。<lb/>在Stable ToolBench和BFCL上的實驗表明，ParaTool顯著超越了強大的基於ICL的基準，實現了更優的性能，同時降低了計算複雜性。
2605.29561.author: Zekai Yu et.al.
2605.29561.authors: Zekai Yu, Qi Meng, Qizhi Chu, Yu Hao, Chuan Shi, Cheng Yang
